arguments.command:
for pkg in System.Text.Json Microsoft.Extensions.Logging Azure.Storage.Blobs Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting OpenTelemetry.Extensions.Hosting Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.NewtonsoftJson xunit; do
  ver=$(curl -s "https://api.nuget.org/v3-flatcontainer/$( echo $pkg | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]')/index.json" | python3 -c "import sys,json; versions=[v for v in json.load(sys.stdin)['versions'] if '-' not in v]; print(versions[-1])" 2>/dev/null)
  echo "$pkg => $ver"
done
